summary: Completed testing of critical fixes: Deploy performance (<5s), API keys CRUD, and Gateway validation. Backend tests show excellent performance with deploy completing in 0.13s. Gateway authentication working correctly with proper status codes and headers.

minor_issues.issue: Rate limit headers (X-RateLimit-*) not consistently appearing in responses
minor_issues.impact: Minor - gateway functionality works but rate limit info may not be visible to API consumers

ui_bugs.issue: Page loading issues - blank screen when navigating to endpoints configuration
ui_bugs.details: Frontend compiles successfully but pages show blank content, possibly authentication/session management issue

integration_issues.issue: Unable to complete end-to-end frontend deploy testing due to page loading issues
integration_issues.details: Backend deploy API works perfectly (0.13s), but frontend UI testing incomplete

action_item_for_main_agent: Frontend page loading issue needs investigation - pages compile successfully but show blank content. This may be related to authentication/session management or API connectivity. Backend critical fixes are working excellently.
